GameToken.Name: CycleDirection
GameToken.Description: -1 or 1. Value to add to CurrentItemIndex when changing

GameToken.Name: ShowAmmo
GameToken.Description: Allows game code to force display of your current ammo totals.

GameToken.Name: CombatResupply
GameToken.Description: Hack! Signal from scene to give the player more stuff!

GameToken.Name: FirstItems
GameToken.Description: Hack! Signal from scene to give the player starting items!

GameToken.Name: FirstGun
GameToken.Description: Hack! Signal from scene to give the player starting gun!

GameToken.Name: FirstWeapon
GameToken.Description: Hack! Signal from scene to give the player starting melee weapon!

GameToken.Name: CheatAll
GameToken.Description: Hack! Signal from RTSEvents to load your community up.
